prompt: An anime manhwa style illustration of a heavily built, chubby man with a thick neck and a double chin, looking down at the viewer with an intense, arrogant expression. He has messy {argument name="hair color" default="black"} hair and glowing {argument name="eye color" default="piercing blue"} eyes. He is wearing a crisp white dress shirt under a {argument name="suit color" default="black"} suit jacket, and his right hand is reaching up to adjust his black tie. The lighting is dramatic with sharp shadows, set against a solid {argument name="background color" default="vibrant blue"} gradient background.
translatedPrompt: 动漫韩漫风格的低角度肖像，描绘了一名脖子粗壮、有双下巴、神情傲慢俯视的魁梧肌肉男。他留着凌乱的 {argument name="hair color" default="深蓝色"} 头发，有着 {argument name="eye color" default="发光的浅蓝色"} 眼睛，身穿 {argument name="suit color" default="黑色"} 西装配白色衬衫。一只手正在整理他的黑色领带。{argument name="background color" default="纯色渐变蓝"} 背景，戏剧性光影，线条清晰。

breakdown.creativeCore: 韩漫风格老板肖像：生成一张低角度的动漫或网漫风格肖像，描绘一名身穿西装、正在整理领带的魁梧男子。
breakdown.subject: 人物
breakdown.bestUse: 直播带货界面、社交电商、移动端商品页

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a UI/界面 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[景别/角度/版式层级/主体位置]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: anime]。

Lighting and camera:
[光线/镜头/景深/质感]。

Text requirements:
[是否含文字/精确文字/可读性要求]。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
